_comment: Manual contributions not discoverable via the public GitHub APIs (e.g. repo-only advisories not yet in the global Advisory DB). Auto-merged with API results by scripts/fetch-contributions.mjs.

items.title: Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) via TOCTOU race condition in cap_set_file() through file capability injection
items.summary: A TOCTOU race condition in libcap's cap_set_file() allows an unprivileged local attacker with write access to the parent directory to redirect file capability writes to an arbitrary file via renameat2(RENAME_EXCHANGE), leading to local privilege escalation.

items.title: Arbitrary Code Execution via Scanner Bypass in aws-diagram-mcp-server exec() Namespace
items.summary: HackerOne report #3557138 documents code execution in aws-diagram-mcp-server where untrusted input reaches exec(code, namespace). String-based scanner checks are bypassed via reflective calls, enabling command execution, file access, and environment variable exposure in affected workflows.

items.title: Arbitrary File Deletion via Path Traversal in LiteLLM Proxy
items.summary: Huntr report documents path traversal in LiteLLM proxy dotprompt conversion where user-controlled file.filename is joined into a filesystem path and later unlinked in cleanup. A crafted traversal filename can target writable .prompt files outside the temp directory for overwrite and deletion.

items.title: CVE-2024-22857: Arbitrary Code Execution in zlog via heap-based buffer overflow
items.summary: Heap-based buffer overflow in zlog 1.1.0–1.2.17 in zlog_rule_new(). A missing length check when copying record_name from file_path + 1 lets an attacker overwrite the zlog_record_fn record_func function pointer, achieving arbitrary code execution. CVE assigned by MITRE; not in the global GitHub Advisory DB.
